title: Zuvo Mesh WasteBasket Black Metal Wire Garbage Trash Can For Office Home Bedroom Height 10.1" Width 10", 4 Gallon (16 Quart) (1, Black)
features: Package Dimensions: 25.4 L x 26.67 H x 25.4 W (centimeters)
description: From the manufacturer ABOUT PRODUCT Zuvo metal wire mesh waste basket is made of black, durable steel wire mesh. The basic necessity in your living room is a waste paper bin which can make your waste to clean in stylish appearance. De-clutter and re-organize your living room with the living room bin. You can place it just about anywhere without drawing attention to it. Those elegance get rid of the trash easily. Powder coat finish Round shape METAL MESH WASTE PAPER BIN Zuvo Made of black durable steel wire mesh These mesh bins are an ideal solution for your home or workplace because they are lightweight and easy to clean. The durable mesh wastebasket holds its shape over time and offers subtle transparency. Ideal for use in the office, kitchen, bathroom, bedroom/dorm room, etc. Steel wire mesh 27 cm x 24 cm Easily fit DURABLE MATERIAL BIN The waste paper bin features steel wire mesh in black, reinforced with a solid metal base & solid edging along the bottom & top rim. AMPLE SPACE This stylish mesh breathable design prevents odors from building up. Helps you to keep everything tidy and organized. STICK TO GROUND Each metal waste paper bin comes with a non-slip base. The non-slip base ensures that the bin does not move during usage.
